name: adjacent_seam_is_malformed_and_seam_is_new_identity_space
note: 3.0.0 Change Two: a seam over ADJACENT (ordinal gap 1) or CO-stratal endpoints is malformed (a seam is for non-adjacent strata; use a Causal Relation Object or Bridge otherwise); and cross_stratal_seam is a new identity scheme that disturbs no existing record.
